prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年北京市综合科类最低位次分别为约 24817→23533→20597→19195→19221 名，整体呈明显前移趋势（位次数字减小），2021–2024 年累计前移约 5622 名；2025 年较 2024 年基本持平（仅后移 26 名），基准位次约 19221 名；该校在北京市综合科类招生计划 2021–2023 年均为 6 人，2024 年增至 8 人，2025 年大幅扩至 15 人；2026 年计划再扩至 20 人，较 2025 年增加 33.3%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 该校为 211 工程、双一流建设高校，校本部（中国石油大学（北京））2026 年软科主榜排名约第 62 名，属中上水平理工类院校；克拉玛依校区与校本部同属一个办学体系，共享学科资源；该校近年声誉文件中未见明显正面或负面舆情事件；抖音学校热度总排名未进入前 106 名，短视频平台曝光度较低，报考关注度一般；该校以石油石化特色为主，校本部石油与天然气工程为 A+ 学科（第五轮学科评估），化学工程与技术为 A-；克拉玛依校区招生专业涵盖石油工程、油气储运工程、资源勘查工程、化学工程与工艺等主干专业，学科实力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能等专业社会热度偏热（2024–2026 年持续推荐），石油工程、油气储运等传统工科热度平稳；北京市 2026 年高考报名总人数约 84900 人，较 2025 年 65434 人增长约 29.7%，竞争显著加剧；该校位于新疆克拉玛依市，距北京较远，属于跨省异地校区，对北京考生存在一定地域偏好劣势，可能降低部分考生的报考意愿。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 19221 名、2026 年扩招 33.3%（缓解竞争）、北京考生总数增长约 29.7%（加剧竞争）以及地域偏远等因素，扩招效应略大于考生增长效应，但考生大幅增长和地域偏好不足对位次有上移压力；预测 2026 年最低位次约 22865 名，区间 22365–23365 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（新疆）（含软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 人工智能（新疆）
- 石油工程（新疆）（数智复合人才实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 石油工程（新疆）
- 油气储运工程（新疆）
- 大数据管理与应用（新疆）
- 智能地球探测（新疆）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 资源勘查工程（新疆）
- 化学工程与工艺（新疆）
- 汉语言文学（新疆）
- 英语（新疆）（语言与计算科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 22365–23365 名内，建议以二档专业（石油工程、油气储运工程、大数据管理与应用）为主力报考方向，一档专业（计算机类、人工智能、数智实验班）作为冲刺，三档专业（资源勘查工程、化学工程与工艺、汉语言文学、英语）作为稳妥保底。该校为 211 双一流，石油主干学科实力突出，适合对能源行业感兴趣的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 24817 → 23533 → 20597 → 19195 → 19221, showing a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative improvement of about 5622 places from 2021 to 2024; in 2025, it remained basically flat compared to 2024 (only a slight drop of 26 places), with a baseline ranking of about 19221; the enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Beijing was 6 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 8 in 2024, and significantly expanded to 15 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is to further expand to 20 students, a 33.3% increase over 2025, which is a significant expansion that may alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: This university is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. The main campus (China University of Petroleum (Beijing)) ranks approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, placing it among mid-to-upper level science and engineering institutions; the Karamay Campus shares the same educational system and disciplinary resources with the main campus; recent reputation documents show no significant positive or negative public opinion events; the university's overall Douyin popularity ranking did not enter the top 106, indicating low exposure on short video platforms and average application attention; the university is characterized by petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with the main campus having A+ disciplines in Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering (fifth round of discipline evaluation) and A- in Chemical Engineering and Technology; the Karamay Campus offers majors including Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering, and Chemical Engineering and Technology, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence are socially popular (continuously recommended from 2024 to 2026), while traditional engineering majors like Petroleum Engineering and Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation have stable popularity; the total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Beijing, and as a cross-provincial off-campus campus, it has a certain geographical preference disadvantage for Beijing candidates, which may reduce some candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 19221, the 33.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the approximately 29.7% increase in Beijing candidates (intensifying competition), and the remote location, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate growth effect, but the significant increase in candidates and insufficient geographical preference put upward pressure on rankings; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 22865, with a range of 22365 to 23365.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Xinjiang) (including Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence (Xinjiang)
- Petroleum Engineering (Xinjiang) (Digital Intelligence Composite Talent Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Petroleum Engineering (Xinjiang)
- Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering (Xinjiang)
- Big Data Management and Application (Xinjiang)
- Intelligent Earth Exploration (Xinjiang).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Resource Exploration Engineering (Xinjiang)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Xinjiang)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Xinjiang)
- English (Xinjiang) (Language and Computational Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 22365 to 23365, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, Big Data Management and Application) as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Digital Intelligence Experimental Class) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Resource Exploration Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Chinese Language and Literature, English) as a safe backup. This university is a 211 Double First-Class institution with outstanding petroleum core disciplines, suitable for candidates interested in the energy industry.

_translation.university_name_en: China University of Petroleum (Beijing Karamay Campus)
